name: CALTIMS

name: CALTRACK
tagline: Master Your Field Service and Payroll Compliance.
description: CALTRACK is an end-to-end platform for managing field operations, automated timesheets, and payroll compliance. Built for service-based businesses and mobile workforces, it bridges the gap between customer bookings and field technician dispatching — eliminating labor compliance risks while streamlining your entire mobile workforce.
contents: CALTRACK bridges the gap between customer bookings and field technician dispatching. It automates timesheets, GPS clock-in verification, mileage reimbursements, and payroll compliance in one platform — reducing administrative processing time by 90% for mobile workforces.

name: Project Management

Built for project managers, finance teams, and vendors in engineering and construction firms, it eliminates manual tracking, reduces billing errors, and gives leadership real-time project visibility.

workflow.headline: CALDIM PMS — Bid to Final Payment
workflow.description: CALDIM PMS controls every step of the engineering project lifecycle — from the first client enquiry to the final reconciled payment, with zero manual handoffs.

stages.name: Log Bid Enquiry
stages.details: Sales team captures client enquiry with full scope and pricing details into the estimation module.

stages.name: Review Estimation Model
stages.details: Management reviews the estimation model summary and approves the bid before it advances to project activation.

stages.name: Activate Live Project
stages.details: Approved bid converts instantly into a live project with PO phases, milestones, and vendor assignments.

stages.name: Track Hours & Change Orders
stages.details: Team logs hours and raises change order requests against the active project — all captured with full audit trail.

stages.name: Generate Invoice
stages.details: Milestone-linked invoices are created and sent to the customer for approval — no manual drafting required.

stages.name: Settle Payments
stages.details: Customer and vendor payments are recorded, reconciled, and closed — the project lifecycle is complete.

name: Warehouse Management
tagline: Smart Warehouse Execution. Zero Packing Errors.
description: This product automates engine-to-accessory matching, packing, and dispatch workflows. Built for floor managers and dispatch operators in industrial manufacturing. Eliminates manual tracking errors and ensures strict dispatch discipline.
contents: Handles the complete inbound-to-outbound warehouse flow — from barcode and QR scanner ingestion at the dock, through intelligent 3D bin allocation, to automated picking checklists and verified dispatch. Every packing and shipping step is traceable with real-time MSSQL sync, ensuring zero mis-shipments across high-volume bays.
videoTagline: Watch Automated Barcode Logging & High-Speed Picking Demo
architectureHighlight: Sub-millisecond inventory bin indexing with 3D spatial coordinate routing.
metrics: High-Speed Barcode & QR Scanner Telemetry Sync
Storage Aisle & Pallet Bay Space Optimization
Zero Mis-Shipment Rate across High-Volume Bays

workflow.headline: End-to-End Asset Request Lifecycle
workflow.description: Asset Management automates the 7-stage engineering asset lifecycle.

stages.name: Submit Request
stages.details: Engineer submits a new tool or asset requirement with specifications.

stages.name: L1 Validation
stages.details: Manager reviews the request and assigns a target completion timeline.

stages.name: Drafting
stages.details: Assigned designer uploads CAD files through the secure quarantine pipeline.

stages.name: Checking
stages.details: Checker reviews the documents and approves them for final review.

stages.name: Sign-Off

stages.name: Implementation
stages.details: Approved design is moved into physical production and marked complete.

name: CALMISC
tagline: Generate accurate steel bids in minutes.
description: CALMISC generates precise stair, railing, and guard-rail bids with real-time cost breakdowns. Built specifically for structural steel fabricators and estimators. Slashes bid turnaround times by 90% while eliminating manual pricing errors.
contents: CALMISC is built specifically for structural steel fabricators and estimators. It slashes bid turnaround times by 90% while eliminating manual pricing errors for stairs and railings.
videoTagline: Watch Real-Time Steel Estimation & Bidding Walkthrough
architectureHighlight: Immutable audit trail logging with barcode register synchronization.
metrics: Print-Ready Proposal PDF Export in One Click

features.title: Configure Stair Geometry
features.desc: Instantly calculates rise, run, slope, and stringer length to prevent alignment errors.

features.title: Attach Rails & Landings
features.desc: Adjusts hardware and mounting costs automatically as you add handrails, guardrails, or landings.

features.title: Calculate Live Costs
features.desc: Tracks raw material weight, scrap factors, finish treatments, and labor rates in real time.

features.title: Verify Code Compliance
features.desc: Flags IBC and OSHA rise/run violations automatically before fabrication begins.

features.title: Generate Instant Proposals
features.desc: Exports print-ready PDF bids and detailed BOM spreadsheets in one click.

features.title: Override Pricing Dynamically
features.desc: Adjusts material costs and markups per project for flexible margins.

whyChoose.title: 90% Faster Estimations
whyChoose.desc: Generate comprehensive bids in minutes instead of spending hours manually compiling spreadsheets.

whyChoose.title: Zero Calculation Mistakes
whyChoose.desc: Automated weight, scrap, and finish formulas prevent underbidding and protect your profit margins.

whyChoose.title: Guaranteed Code Compliance
whyChoose.desc: Built-in IBC and OSHA validation rules warn you of design violations before they hit the shop floor.

whyChoose.title: Instant Client Trust

workflow.headline: CALMISC — From Stairs to Print-Ready Bids
workflow.description: CALMISC generates precise stair, railing, and guard-rail bids with real-time cost breakdowns.

stages.name: Input Stair Dimensions
stages.details: Set the floor-to-floor height, riser limit, and tread width to generate stair slope and stringer length.

stages.name: Select Stringer Style
stages.details: Pick Channel (MC) or Plate stringers to automatically determine structural weight per foot.

stages.name: Add Handrails
stages.details: Attach guard rails, grab rails, or kick plates to either side of the stair flights.

stages.name: Define Mounting Base
stages.details: Select Anchored, Embedded, or Welded connections to automatically price required hardware and grout.

stages.name: Apply Surface Finishes
stages.details: Choose Primer, Galvanizing, or Powder Coating to instantly calculate surface area pricing.

stages.name: Export Detailed Bid
stages.details: Review the live cost summary and download print-ready customer proposals and Excel spreadsheets.
